figures.caption: Figure 1: Overview of the proposed dataset pipeline, which introduces has two different assessors undertake two different tasks to produce an assortment of gaze data.

Figure 2: Gaze overlays organized by radiograph diagnosis for Diagnosis Task (Task 1) and Visual Turing Test (Task 2), across real X-rays and AI-generated images. Each row corresponds to a pathology category. Columns alternate between saliency maps (duration-weighted Gaussian heatmaps, 𝜎 = 25px) and scanpath overlays (up to 16 observers)
Table 3: Gaze statistics per task and image type (mean±SD across participants). (𝑁Task1 = 21, 𝑁Task2 = 18).
